meta.dashboard_description: Your personal Flavia space. Pick conversations back up, follow your emotional progress and discover recommended content.
meta.account_description: Manage your subscription, review recent conversations and keep track of your Flavia account.

items: What isn't spoken about doesn't exist.
Desire is like a muscle: the more you exercise it, the stronger it gets.
Intimacy doesn't begin when the lights go out. It begins in the way someone looks at you.
There isn't one correct way to be a woman in bed. There are as many ways as there are women.
Setting a boundary doesn't make you cold. It makes you clear.
Sexuality is like LEGO: we never build it the same way twice.
Foreplay begins when the sexual encounter ends.
You have to deconstruct yourself in order to build yourself.
Happiness isn't euphoria. Happiness is another word for calm.
A woman who frees herself frees other women.

sections.free_plan_description: You have limited messages per session.
sections.for_you_topic: Related to what you're working through: {topic}
sections.first_conversation_description: You can talk about anything. No judgment, no rush. Flavia is with you from the very first message.
sections.choose_topic_description: If you don't know where to begin, choose what resonates most with you
sections.for_starters_description: Library pieces to get to know Flavia
sections.upgrade_description: Get access to all premium content and chat with Flavia whenever you need.
sections.summary_description: Generate a summary of your latest conversation with Flavia.

progress.first_step: You've taken the first step. That's already brave.
progress.habit: You've had {count} conversations. You're building a self-care habit.
progress.commitment: You've had {count} conversations. That says a lot about your commitment to yourself.
progress.dominant_topic: Your most frequent topic is {topic}. Flavia notices it's important to you.

starter_cards.desire: I feel like I've lost my desire and I don't know why
starter_cards.communication: I don't know how to tell them what I need
starter_cards.couple_connection: I feel like we've lost the spark
starter_cards.pleasure: I want to explore what I truly enjoy
starter_cards.boundaries: It's hard for me to say no without feeling guilty
starter_cards.routine: Everything feels repetitive and I want to change it
starter_cards.menopause: I'm going through hormonal changes and I notice they affect my intimacy
starter_cards.education: I want to understand sexuality better without taboos

account.title: Your Flavia account
account.subtitle: Your current status, conversation continuity and recent activity signals in one place.

billing.summary_paid: Your subscription is connected to Stripe and ready to manage.
billing.renewal_synced: This date is synced from your current subscription.
billing.renewal_missing: It will appear here once there is an active or trial cycle.
billing.portal_missing_sync: Your payment has already returned from Stripe. We're waiting for the final subscription sync before enabling the billing portal.
billing.portal_missing: There isn't a billing portal linked to this account yet. Once you activate a paid plan, you'll be able to manage it here.
billing.awaiting_sync: If you don't see the change right away, use Refresh plan status while Stripe finishes propagating the webhook.

chat.title: Chat continuity
chat.empty_description: Once you start using chat, you'll see your recent sessions here with the detected topic and message volume.

interactions.title: Opened recommendations
interactions.empty_description: When you open recommendations from chat, this history will help you return to content and products that already caught your attention.
